since_last: 40% of 101 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.44%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 40% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.11% · BTC -0.58% · Gold +2.00% · Nasdaq100 -0.06%. 40% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.44%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.44%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -3.13%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +22.74%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +22.74%, DELL +9.68%, HPE +4.54%, CRNC +4.23%, AVAV +4.04%. Laggards: PATH -12.75%, GEV -8.20%, AI -6.00%, NOW -5.79%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.16% at $120.87
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.16% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
